title: Featured Projects
subtitle: A collection of web applications and digital products in the development of which I participated.
noResults: No projects found matching your criteria.

list.title: Smail Shop - Children's Clothing E-commerce
list.description: Development of a responsive frontend for a modern kids' outerwear e-commerce platform featuring a hybrid wholesale/retail B2B/B2C sales system and complex size matrices.

list.title: Druid - Enterprise Project & Knowledge Management Platform
list.description: A feature-rich corporate workspace designed to automate business workflows, team collaboration, and wiki management by unifying interactive project management tools into a single ecosystem.

list.title: Sodis-Camp - Premium Bespoke Tours & Expeditions Web Platform
list.description: Development of an interactive frontend for a luxury travel service featuring custom catalog filters, inline map/gallery previews within product cards, geo-targeted widgets, and dynamic video layouts.

list.title: Parent Assistant - Digital Ecosystem for K-12 Education
list.description: Development of a Next.js-powered frontend for a national educational platform, featuring high-density data directories, interactive event calendars, student diagnostics, and real-time client-side filtering engines.

list.title: Delta - Corporate Web Platform for a Leasing Company
list.description: Development of the frontend layers for a commercial leasing platform, featuring an interactive financial calculator, automated geo-location detection, dynamic reports grids, and advanced lead generation forms.

list.title: Internal Construction Management & Automation Platform
list.description: Fullstack development of an interactive cyclogram and master schedule engine for a real estate developer. Features floor-by-floor and section-by-section task planning, runtime progress tracking, and dependency chain management.

list.title: Cinimex - Enterprise Corporate Web Portal for an IT Integrator
list.description: Frontend development of a high-load corporate website using block-based UI constructors, interactive Google Maps routes from subway stations, a comprehensive career dashboard, and complete English/Russian localization mirrors.

list.title: New Chernogolovka School - Educational Institution Web Portal
list.description: Frontend development and deep customization of a school management website. Features an accessible UI version compliant with WCAG 2.1, dynamic live search, online application wizard forms, and interactive exam metrics.

list.title: Cicle - B2B Wholesale Distribution Web Platform
list.description: Frontend development of a secured wholesale e-commerce portal. Features an interactive transport volume load calculator, a high-density tabular catalog grid for power users, multi-profile company accounts, and debt-tracking metrics dashboards.
